prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等 专业2026年社会热度为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，相关专业在东华大学招生占比较高，吸引高分考生报考；四川省2026年高考总人数约535,000人，较2025年（物理类+历史类合计约46 2,767人）增加约15.6%，按比例估算物理类考生约329,025人，增加约44,236人，竞争显著加剧；东华大学位于上海，对四川考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在四川省招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属中等偏下水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次前移趋势、2026年招生计划仅微扩1人、四川省考生总数大幅增加约15.6%导致竞争加剧、学校软科排名持续上升增强吸引力、计算机/电子信息 等热门专业高热推荐等因素，竞争加剧效应显著超过扩招缓解效应，结合考生规模激增和学校热度提升，预测最低位次约17736名，区间17236– 18236名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 30729 → 18012 → 16027 → 17774. In 2023, it moved significantly forward by about 12,717 places compared to 2022; in 2024, it continued to move forward by about 1,985 places; in 2025 (Physics Category), it moved slightly backward by about 1,747 places. Over the past three years, the overall trend has been forward, with a baseline of about 17,774 in 2025. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 63 in 2022 → 68 in 2023 → 68 in 2024 → 66 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 67, a slight increase of 1 student (+1.5%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion and minimal relief on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 72nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years (81 in 2021 → 80 in 2022 → 77 in 2023 → 76 in 2024 → 74 in 2025 → 72 in 2026), indicating steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. No related public opinion incidents were found in the reputation file, with overall reputation stable. Douyin popularity ranking is 96, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal signals in application popularity. No records of enrollment gaps were observed. Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (fifth round evaluation), and Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional flagship (leading nationally), directly corresponding to the Materials and Textile majors in the enrollment plan. Although Computer and Electronic Information majors lack A-level discipline evaluations, they have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in 2026 social popularity, with a high proportion of enrollment at Donghua University, attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of Sichuan Province college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (Physics + History categories totaling about 462,767). By proportion, Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 329,025, an increase of about 44,236, significantly intensifying competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Sichuan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Sichuan Province is about 2.3% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of forward rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan with only a slight increase of 1 student, a significant increase of about 15.6% in the total number of Sichuan candidates leading to intensified competition, the continuous rise in Donghua University's Soft Science ranking enhancing its appeal, and the high recommendation of popular majors like Computer and Electronic Information, the effect of intensified competition significantly outweighs the relief from expansion. Combined with the surge in candidate numbers and increased school popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is about 17,736, with a range of 17,236 to 18,236.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17,236 to 18,236, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<17,236) can focus on popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer and Electronic Information; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>18,236) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. Donghua University's Materials Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, so candidates interested in materials majors should pay special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025 (History Category), the minimum ranking is approximately 3772, which is currently the only reference baseline ranking; the provincial liberal arts group plan for 2025 (History Category) is 8 students; the 2026 History Category plan is 9 students, an increase of 1 student (+12.5%) compared to 2025, with a relatively large expansion rate, which has a certain mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 72nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuous rise in recent years, steadily improving university level; no related public opinion incidents of Donghua University appear in the reputation file, overall reputation is stable; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th, rated as "average", with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; Materials Science and Engineering is A-level, but not directly related to the liberal arts group enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication Studies from 2023 to 2024 has a social popularity of "clearly discouraged" (Zhang Xuefeng effect); the Business Administration major under the Economic Management Pilot Class is "clearly discouraged"; the Foreign Language major under Japanese is "generally wait-and-see"; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Sichuan Province college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, with an estimated 205,975 History Category candidates by proportion, an increase of about 15.7% compared to the 2025 History Category of 177,978, intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Sichuan liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 12.5% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (mitigating competition), the approximately 15.7% increase in History Category candidates in Sichuan Province (intensifying competition), and the clearly discouraged social popularity of Journalism and Communication/Business Administration majors (reducing application popularity), the intensification of competition and expansion effect roughly offset each other, but the increase in candidate numbers is greater. Combined with the increase in candidate scale and the cooling of some major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3975, with a range of 3475–4475.
